subcodes.title: Words to Mirza Muhammad Ali Khan, ca. 1906
subcodes.first_line: Consider ye how in the bygone year the enemies and ill-wishers of this Wronged One arose with consummate mischief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ملاحطه نمائید که در سنهٴ ماضیه اعداء و بدخواهان این مظلوم بنهایت فساد برخاستند
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @Ottoman commissions of investigation
